violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Reachin cooler interior not properly maintained. Observed heavy build up on interior shelving of upright cooler.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service items noted being stored on the floor. To-go clamshell containers and to-go cups being stored on floor in storage area.
FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Cookie cutters and other utensils are not washed on a regular basis or after being used.
STORAGE/HANDLING CLEAN EQUIP & UTENSILS (1 pts): Observed cookie cutters being stored in bins with heavy debris build up.
